title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Dalmia Bharat

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Dalmia Bharat
jsonLd.description:
We at Dalmia Bharat are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dalmia Bharat:
Dalmia Bharat is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat!
